title: Savory Moroccan Foie Gras Rfissa
description: A savory and gooey one-pot Moroccan dish featuring foie gras and stir-fry, FODMAP-friendly and made in the form of rfissa.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the garlic-free spice blend, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the sliced foie gras and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until it is seared and cooked through.
Add the chicken broth and lemon juice to the skillet, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, or until the liquid has reduced slightly.
Stir in the chopped parsley and cook for an additional minute.
To serve, place a piece of toasted rfissa bread in the bottom of a bowl, then spoon the foie gras mixture over the top.
